*Camera Jabber* | 22/01/2026 | Score: 0.70
Tags: evaluation, inference, creative_tool, creative_workflow, photography

> Glyph Production Technologies has unveiled the Atom EVX, a new line of ultra-fast portable SSDs engineered for demanding creative professionals working with high-resolution video, RAW photography, and field production. With speeds reaching up to 2,800MB/s, the Atom EVX series combines cutting-edge NVMe performance with rugged reliability in a palm-sized aluminium enclosure. Designed to meet the data-intensive needs of content creators shooting in 8K, ProRes, RAW, or multi-cam formats, the Atom EVX uses USB-C (USB 3.2 Gen 2&#215;2) to maximise bandwidth. Whether offloading massive video files or editing directly from the drive, it promises smooth, stutter-free performance—especially valuable for workflows on set or on location. The drive is built around an NVMe solid-state platform housed in a thermally efficient, MIL-SPEC-rated aluminium shell, offering robust protection against heat, drops, vibration, and the rigours of travel. ## [Viltrox NexusFocus F1 Brings AI Autofocus to Manual Cine Glass](https://camerajabber.com/photography-news/viltrox-nexusfocus-f1-brings-ai-autofocus-to-manual-cine-glass/)
*Camera Jabber* | 24/01/2026 | Score: 0.70
Tags: model_release, hardware, creative_tool, creative_workflow, announcement, photography, camera, lens

> Viltrox has announced a groundbreaking new product for filmmakers and vintage lens enthusiasts: the NexusFocus F1, a high-precision autofocus adapter that transforms manual PL-mount cinema lenses into intelligent, autofocus-capable tools on Sony E-mount cameras. Launched via Kickstarter on January 15th, the NexusFocus F1 is the first adapter of its kind to offer full FIZ (focus, iris, zoom) motor control powered by AI subject recognition and Sony’s phase-detection autofocus (PDAF) system. This compact yet robust adapter allows creators to integrate legendary cine optics into modern autofocus workflows, opening new creative possibilities for solo shooters, run-and-gun filmmakers, and small crews. By pairing classic manual lenses with Sony’s advanced subject-tracking features, the NexusFocus F1 eliminates the need for external LiDAR systems, making AI autofocus more accessible and efficient in dynamic shooting environments. Constructed from aluminium alloy and stainless steel, the unit weighs just 262g and features a dust-resistant mount, USB-C power port, and...
